case_title: PLSEK, GEORGE AND JITKA VS RAST, WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23654, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLSEK, GEORGE AND JITKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAST, WILLIAM HAMILTON FINANCIAL CORPORATION $540.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $555.00, DEFDS. BREACHED CONTRACT; MEASURE OF DAMAGES IS EXTRA PENALTY PLTFF PAID, DEFDS MAY HAVE CLAIMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,207.28 FILED BY PLSEK, GEORGE AND JITKA AS TO DEFENDANT RAST, WILLIAM HAMILTON FINANCIAL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
CERT. RECEIPT TO WILLIAM RAST (HAMILTON FINANC) RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLSEK, GEORGE AND JITKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAST, WILLIAM HAMILTON FINANCIAL CORPORATION $735.76 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.76, COURT FEELS THAT THE PLFT ALSO MAY HAVE CASUE OF ACTION AGAINST CB FINANCIAL SERV. OR CHICAGO TITLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CO. THESE TWO, ALONG WITH HAMILTON FINANCIAL CO. APPEAR EQUALLY LIABLE FOR MISTAKES CONCERNING CALCULATION OF PLFT'S PROPERTY TXES.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HAMILTON FINANCIAL CORPORATION
